class.name: IterateIK3D
class.brief_description: The inverse kinematics solver to approach the goal by repeating small rotations.
class.description: The inverse kinematics solver to approach the goal by repeating small rotations. The bending direction is solved by two passes via processing up to the middle of the chain and processing the entire chain.

method.name: get_pole_node
method.description: Returns the pole target node that the middle bone (half of bone chain) is trying to reach as pre-processing of the main iteration.

method.name: get_target_node
method.description: Returns the target node that the end bone is trying to reach.

method.name: set_pole_node
method.description: Sets the pole target node that the middle bone (half of bone chain) is trying to reach as pre-processing of the main iteration.

method.name: set_target_node
method.description: Sets the target node that the end bone is trying to reach.

members.member: The maximum amount each bone can rotate in a single iteration. [b]Note:[/b] This limitation is applied during each iteration. For example, if [member max_iterations] is [code]4[/code] and [member angular_delta_limit] is [code]5[/code] degrees, the maximum rotation possible in a single frame is [code]20[/code] degrees.
Number of iteration loops used by the IK solver to produce more accurate results.
The minimum distance between end bone and target. If the distance is below this value, the IK solver stops further iterations.
